name: gotify
description: Send push notifications to a self-hosted Gotify server

tools.name: gotify_send
tools.description: Send a push notification via Gotify. Use this to notify the user about completed tasks, alerts, reminders, or any important information.

title.description: Notification title. Defaults to 'Kageho' if not provided.

required_secrets.name: gotify_app_token
required_secrets.description: Gotify application token for sending messages

auth.setup_instructions:
1. Log into your Gotify web UI
2. Go to Apps > Create Application
3. Copy the application token
4. Set GOTIFY_APP_TOKEN to this value
5. Set GOTIFY_URL to your Gotify server URL
